locations.name: Samar Island Natural Park
locations.summary: The Samar Island Natural Park, in Samar, is the largest contiguous tract of old-growth forest in the Philippines.

relations.subject: Philippine oriole
relations.evidence: It is found in multiple protected areas such as Pasonanca Natural Park, Rajah Sikatuna Protected Landscape, Northern Negros Natural Park and Samar Island Natural Park but like all areas in the Philippines, protection is lax and deforestation continues despite this protection on paper
